topic: How to Cut Claude Code Costs by 70%: Token Limits, Caching, and Budgets

key_points: Claude Code pricing based on token usage with tiered plans
Enterprise plans offer volume discounts and custom billing
Context window management reduces token consumption
Smart caching strategies can reduce repeated API calls
Claude 3.5 Sonnet at $3 per million input / $15 per million output tokens
Claude 3 Opus at $15 per million input / $75 per million output tokens
Free tier includes 100k tokens per month for testing
Team plans start at $20/user/month with volume discounts
Use shorter prompts and precise instructions to reduce token usage
Implement client-side caching for common code patterns
Set per-task token budgets to control costs
Monitor usage with Anthropic's dashboard analytics
